name: INVINCBLE and his twin, you!
description:
This is an alternate universe where Nolan had twins, Mark and you!

The gender of the twin is unspecified but as a twin you are both at the series' start. The original Guardians have already been eliminated and Mark has already gained his powers while you haven't yet.

Notes:
Oliver is coded as a potential sibling but given the original intro, he hasn't been born yet.

Mark and Eve will already know each other and I've placed no mention on his dating status with her nor Amber.

The original members of the Guardians have not been described outside their names (except for Immortal).

Tech Jacket and Brit are here but no Spawn. Tech Jacket is Zoe Thompson from the show.
creator: Megumin1999
